shortDescription: A vast and active star-forming region containing some of the most massive stars known.
notableFeature: Contains Eta Carinae, a massive unstable star
name: Carina Nebula

shortDescription: The expanding remains of a massive star explosion recorded by ancient astronomers.
name: Crab Nebula
Eagle Nebula
shortDescription: Famous for the iconic Pillars of Creation captured by the Hubble Space Telescope.
A nearby planetary nebula formed from a dying star shedding its outer layers.
notableFeature: Often called the Eye of God
name: Helix Nebula

shortDescription: A stunning nebula shaped like an hourglass created by a dying star.
name: Hourglass Nebula

shortDescription: A massive star-forming region visible to the naked eye in the Orion constellation.
notableFeature: One of the brightest and most studied star-forming regions
name: Orion Nebula

shortDescription: Famous towering structures of gas and dust where new stars are born.
name: Pillars of Creation

shortDescription: A planetary nebula with a ghostly skull-like appearance.
name: Skull Nebula

shortDescription: A dark nebula illuminated by nearby stars forming a witch-like silhouette.
name: Witch Head Nebula
